Appearances:
Plaintiff Stanley E. Pareto is present.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keigh appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Larry Paradis is present.
Attorney Josh Schreiber representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of SEP-04-2012 is vacated.
